creator: lg@spirale-ingenierie.com
text: To do not use a "current" version instead a "stable" version for a little server in production (previous server is dead) and because I must reinstall the system after a bad op, I tried many versions : 11.3, 12, 12.1... without success... but I needed times and tries to install the version 13.0 again ! => kernel panic (new message), even after a cold boot... and finally after 4 or 5 attempts, the system is installed... Now the system seems to be Ok and stable.
